title: Fault Code 01 - Indoor Unit Protection Device Tripped
summary: Indoor unit protection device tripped due to high water level in drain pan, float switch activated.

structured_payload.cause: 接水盘水位高，浮子开关动作

evidence_quote: 01 室内机 保护装置跳脱 接水盘水位高，浮子开关动作

title: Fault Code 02 - Outdoor Unit Protection Device Tripped
summary: Outdoor unit protection device tripped due to refrigerant pipe blockage, excessive refrigerant, non-condensable gas mixed in, or phase sequence error.

structured_payload.cause: 制冷剂管路堵塞，制冷剂过多、不凝缩气体混入；相序错误

evidence_quote: 02 室外机 保护装置跳脱 制冷剂管路堵塞，制冷剂过多、不凝缩气体混入；相序错误

title: Fault Code 03 - Communication Error Between Indoor and Outdoor Units
summary: Communication error between indoor and outdoor units due to loose connectors, broken wires, or incorrect wiring; outdoor unit power off or blown fuse.

structured_payload.description: 室内机和室外机之间通讯异常 / 室外机和室外机之间通讯异常
structured_payload.cause: 操作回路的插线商子松脱、断线、接线错误 / 室外机电源 OFF、保险丝熔断

evidence_quote:
03
通讯问题室内机和室外机之间通讯异常 操作回路的插线商子松脱、断线、接线错误
室外机和室外机之间通讯异常 室外机电源 OFF、保险丝熔断

title: Fault Code 04 - Communication Error Between Outdoor Unit PCB and Compressor Drive Board
summary: Communication error between outdoor unit PCB and compressor drive board due to communication error, broken wire, or incorrect wiring.

structured_payload.description: 室外机基板和压机驱动板通讯异常
structured_payload.cause: 通讯错误、断线、接线错误

evidence_quote:
04室外机基板和压机驱动板通讯异
常通讯错误、断线、接线错误

title: Fault Code 05 - Power Phase Sequence Error
summary: Power phase sequence error due to phase sequence error or phase loss.

structured_payload.cause: 相序错误、缺相

evidence_quote: 05 电源相序 电源相序异常 相序错误、缺相

title: Fault Code 06 - Inverter Voltage Abnormal
summary: Inverter voltage abnormal due to power supply voltage fluctuation, wiring error, or insufficient power supply capacity.

structured_payload.cause: 电源电压波动，接线错误或供电线路容量不足

evidence_quote: 06 电压波动 变频电压异常 电源电压波动，接线错误或供电线路容量不足

title: Fault Code 07 - Discharge Superheat Decrease
summary: Discharge superheat decrease due to excessive refrigerant or electronic expansion valve locked fully open.

structured_payload.cause: 制冷剂过多、电子膨胀阀锁定全开状态

evidence_quote:
07
制冷循环排气过热度减小 制冷剂过多、电子膨胀阀锁定全开状态

title: Fault Code 08 - Discharge Superheat Too High (Compressor Top)
summary: Discharge superheat too high at compressor top due to insufficient refrigerant, leakage, blockage, or electronic expansion valve locked closed.

structured_payload.description: 排气过热度过高( 压缩机顶部)
structured_payload.cause: 制冷剂不足、泄漏、堵塞或电子膨胀阀锁定在关闭状态

evidence_quote: 08 排气过热度过高( 压缩机顶部) 制冷剂不足、泄漏、堵塞或电子膨胀阀锁定在关闭状态

title: Fault Code 09 - Outdoor Fan Motor Protection Device Tripped
summary: Outdoor fan motor protection device tripped due to fan motor fault.

structured_payload.cause: 风扇电机故障

evidence_quote: 09室外风扇电机 保护装置跳脱 风扇电机故障

title: Fault Code 31 - Indoor/Outdoor Unit Capacity Setting Mismatch
summary: Indoor and outdoor unit capacity setting mismatch due to incorrect capacity code setting, total indoor capacity code too large or too small.

structured_payload.description: 室内机和室外机能力设定、容量组合错误
structured_payload.cause: 容量代码设定错误，室内机合计容量代码过大、过小

evidence_quote:
31
系统室内机和室外机能力设定、容量
组合错误容量代码设定错误，室内机合计容量代码过大、过小

title: Fault Code 35 - Duplicate Indoor Unit Number Setting
summary: Duplicate indoor unit number setting within the same refrigeration cycle.

structured_payload.cause: 同一制冷循环存在相同编号的室内机

evidence_quote: 35 室内机编号设定错误 同一制冷循环存在相同编号的室内机

title: Fault Code 36 - Indoor Unit Combination Error (J-type with R22)
summary: Indoor unit combination error: J-type indoor unit using R22 refrigerant.

structured_payload.cause: 室内机为 J型(用22制冷剂)

evidence_quote: 36 室内机组合错误 室内机为 J型(用22制冷剂)

title: Fault Code 38 - Outdoor Unit Protection Circuit Fault
summary: Outdoor unit protection circuit fault due to PCB failure or wiring error.

structured_payload.description: 室外机的保护电路异常
structured_payload.cause: 室外机PCB故障，接线错误

evidence_quote: 38 室外机的保护电路异常 室外机PCB故障，接线错误

title: Fault Code 43 - Low Pressure Ratio Protection Activated
summary: Low pressure ratio protection activated due to compressor fault (inverter fault, compressor power line fault).

structured_payload.cause: 压缩机不良( 变频器故障、压缩机电源线不良)

evidence_quote:
43
压力压比过低保护启动 压缩机不良( 变频器故障、压缩机电源线不良)

title: Fault Code 44 - Low Pressure Too High Protection Activated
summary: Low pressure too high protection activated due to excessive indoor heat load in cooling, high outdoor temperature in heating, or electronic expansion valve locked fully open.

structured_payload.cause: 制冷时室内热负荷过大、制热时室外温度过高、电子膨胀阀锁定全开状态

evidence_quote: 44 低压过高保护启动 制冷时室内热负荷过大、制热时室外温度过高、电子膨胀阀锁定全开状态

title: Fault Code 45 - High Pressure Too High Protection Activated
summary: High pressure too high protection activated due to excessive refrigerant, overload operation, or poor heat exchanger heat dissipation.

structured_payload.cause: 制冷剂过量、超负荷运行，热交换器散热不良

evidence_quote: 45 高压过高保护启动 制冷剂过量、超负荷运行，热交换器散热不良

title: Fault Code 46 - High Pressure Too Low Protection Activated
summary: High pressure too low protection activated due to insufficient refrigerant, electronic expansion valve locked closed, or refrigerant leakage.

structured_payload.cause: 制冷剂不足，电子膨胀阀锁定在关闭状态，制冷剂泄漏

evidence_quote: 46 高压过低保护启动 制冷剂不足，电子膨胀阀锁定在关闭状态，制冷剂泄漏

title: Fault Code 47 - Low Pressure Too Low Protection Activated
summary: Low pressure too low protection activated due to insufficient refrigerant, electronic expansion valve locked closed, or refrigerant leakage.

structured_payload.cause: 制冷剂不足，电子膨胀阀锁定在关闭状态，制冷剂泄漏

evidence_quote: 47 低压过低保护启动 制冷剂不足，电子膨胀阀锁定在关闭状态，制冷剂泄漏

title: Fault Code 48 - Inverter Overcurrent Protection Activated
summary: Inverter overcurrent protection activated due to overload, overcurrent, or compressor locked rotor.

structured_payload.cause: 过载、过流、压缩机堵转

evidence_quote:
48
变频器变频器过流保护动作 过载、过流、压缩机堵转
